# Functional Programming Modules[¶](#functional-programming-modules "Link to this heading")

The modules described in this chapter provide functions and classes that support
a functional programming style, and general operations on callables.

The following modules are documented in this chapter:

* [`itertools` — Functions creating iterators for efficient looping](itertools.html)
  + [Itertool Functions](itertools.html#itertool-functions)
  + [Itertools Recipes](itertools.html#itertools-recipes)
* [`functools` — Higher-order functions and operations on callable objects](functools.html)
  + [`partial` Objects](functools.html#partial-objects)
* [`operator` — Standard operators as functions](operator.html)
  + [Mapping Operators to Functions](operator.html#mapping-operators-to-functions)
  + [In-place Operators](operator.html#in-place-operators)

#### Previous topic

[`statistics` — Mathematical statistics functions](statistics.html "previous chapter")
